gauge.name: Kokosing River at Mt Vernon

impacts.statement: Major flooding will occur from Howard Street to Greenwood Avenue and along Division, Butler and Kirk Streets.
Significant flooding can be expected along Mt. Vernon and Maplewood Avenues and from Cherry to Maple Streets. Also flooding will occur along Center, Curtis and Adams Runs.
Levee breached siginificant flooding along area roads including Mt. Vernon, Maplewood Avenue, Cherry to Maple. Backwater flooding along Center Run, Curtis Run and Adams Run.
FEMA 1 percent flood level. River approaching top of levee system.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
